title: Sales & Inventory Analytics
description: Analyze POS transactions, track sales trends, monitor inventory turnover, and identify top-performing products across store locations.
longDescription: This demo deploys a retail analytics environment built on the medallion architecture. It ingests synthetic point-of-sale transaction data along with product catalog, store location, and inventory snapshot dimensions. The pipeline produces daily and weekly sales aggregations, basket analysis metrics, inventory turnover rates, and demand indicators. A star-schema semantic model powers dashboards showing revenue trends, top products, store-level comparisons, and inventory health alerts.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: Point-of-sale transactions with transaction ID, store, product, quantity, price, discount, timestamp
Product catalog — SKU, name, category, subcategory, brand, unit cost
Store locations — store ID, name, city, state, region, format (mall/street/outlet)
Daily inventory levels per store per product

fabricItems.name: retail_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all retail analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean transactions, conform product/store dimensions, calculate line totals

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: Aggregate daily sales, inventory turnover, basket metrics

fabricItems.name: retail_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model — sales & inventory tables with revenue, margin, and stockout measures

fabricItems.name: Retail Sales Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Sales Overview, Inventory & Risk, Margin & Basket Analysis

fabricItems.name: daily_retail_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates Bronze → Silver → Gold notebook execution daily
